LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC., HAGEN CHOI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 REQUIRES A DEFENDANT, BEFORE FILING THE DEMURRER, TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE COMPLAINT AND TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING THE MEANS BY WHICH THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. DEFENDANTS SHALL IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DUE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 15, 2021. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

DECLARATION OF BARBARA L. LYONS IN SUPPORT OF PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 430.41(A) IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66263073) FILED BY DEFENDANT OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. CHOI, HAGEN

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. AND HAGEN CHOI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. AND HAGEN CHOI'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. AND HAGEN CHOI HAVE TEN (10) DAYS TO ANSWER. (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1320(G).) [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS.] COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. AND HAGEN CHOI IS REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC. and HAGEN CHOI's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendants Optima Investments, Inc. and Hagen Choi's Demurrer is overruled. Defendants Optima Investments, Inc. and Hagen Choi have ten (10) days to answer. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1320(g).)

[see word minutes for details.]

Counsel for Defendants Optima Investments, Inc. and Hagen Choi is required to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC., HAGEN CHOI'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

Off calendar for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41. Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 requires a defendant, before filing the demurrer, to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" with the party who filed the complaint and to file a declaration stating the means by which the parties met and conferred. Defendants shall immediately meet and confer with plaintiffs. Defendants' response to the first amended complaint is due no later than January 15, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS OPTIMA INVESTMENTS, INC., HAGEN CHOI'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

Defendants' special motion to strike the First Amended Complaint is denied.

(See word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the plaintiff is to prepare and submit proposed order which tracks the tentative ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
